reviews.comment:
Pésima la nafta. Lo mismo me dijeron de un taller de la zona. Cargue Infinia Nafta y a las horas se me prendió la luz de tablero de Problema de Motor. Buscando en internet decían que el problema podía estar relacionado a la Nafta. Dicho y hecho. Cargue vpower en Shell y se apagó la luz. Muy mala la Nafta y surtidores viejos.

(Translated by Google)
The gas is terrible. I heard the same thing at a local garage. I filled up with Infinia gasoline and a few hours later the Check Engine light came on. I searched online and found that the problem could be related to the gas. Sure enough, I filled up with V-Power at Shell and the light went off. The gas is really bad and the pumps are old.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRNEtycVd3EAE

reviews.comment:
Dos horas haciendo cola en un surtidor para que me digan que infinia cargan en el otro, para el que se accede dando yna vuelta de cuatro cuadras. Ni te ofrecen limpiarte el vidrio

(Translated by Google)
I waited in line for two hours at one gas station only to be told that they only fill up at the other one, which is four blocks away. They didn't even offer to clean my windshield.
